title: M.Sc. Microbiology - 2 yr
content: M.Sc. Microbiology program is of two years duration study program and is divided into four semesters. Microbiology is the branch of the science that deals with the detail study of microorganisms such as bacteria, fungi, protozoa and viruses. This program includes collecting information of diversity and exploration micro-organisms from extreme environments. It also includes about the pathogenicity of the microorganism and etiology of the diseases. The students will also learn the application of bacteria, fungi, protozoa and viruses in traditional (food, dairy, wine, antibiotics, fermentation, etc.), biotechnological industries, agricultural industries and on environmental aspect Bachelor Degree in Basic Health or Allied Science with minimum 50% marks or equivalent Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit. With a degree in Microbiology, students can get job opportunities in various fields like healthcare organizations, forensic science laboratories, environmental organizations, higher education at institutions, food and beverages, publicly funded research organizations, pharmaceuticals and many other industries. Further students can explore opportunities to go for higher educations at national and international level (as research scholars). 01 To provide a comprehensive understanding of core microbiological concepts integrating Cell Biology, Biochemistry, Molecular Biology, and Immunology. 02 To develop critical thinking and analytical skills for solving real-world problems in microbiology. 03 To impart hands-on laboratory training and technical expertise through practical sessions, experiments, and project work. 04 To nurture research aptitude and scientific inquiry for advanced studies and innovation in life sciences. 05 To prepare students for diverse career opportunities in pharmaceuticals, healthcare, agriculture, food industry, biotechnology, and environmental sectors. 06 To promote ethical practices, scientific integrity, and a commitment to lifelong learning. 07 To foster the ability to communicate scientific knowledge effectively, both in writing and oral presentations. 08 To enable graduates to contribute meaningfully to scientific and technological advancements for societal benefit. 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08 01 The graduated young minds will be ignited to understand the microbial word and its scientific concepts through application based learning. 02 The graduates will be emphasized on applied aspects of advance biological techniques by hands-on training and to inculcate ethics and professional attitude. 03 The graduates will be trained for self-directed learning, recognizing, continuing educational needs in occupying positions in research, industries and related organization. 01 Developing deeper understanding of key concepts of basic and allied branches of Microbiology such as molecular cell and molecular biology, immunology, microbiology, biotechnology, clinical and industrial microbiology. 02 Equip students with analytical and technical skills related to Microbiology and allied subjects through application based learning such as use of audio visual aids, problem/project based learning, guest lectures, visits to industrial and academic organizations and to practice evidence based microbiology.
